name: Large Wooden Plant Stand - Threshold™
description:
Beautifully display fuss-free greenery in your home with this Large Wooden Plant Stand from Threshold™. This acacia wooden plant stand features a round shape with four legs for a stunning look. Great for displaying real or faux plants indoors or outdoors, you can place it solo or with other planters.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
